heading: Short title
label: 30301 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Death on the High Seas Act”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3030146 App.:761 note.

Short Title, , which enacted chapter 21 (§ 761 et seq.) of the former Appendix to this title, was popularly known as the “Death on the High Seas Act”, prior to being repealed and restated in this chapter by , §§ 6(c), 19, , , 1710.Act Mar. 30, 1920, ch. 11141 Stat. 537Pub.
